content: Autonomous curiosity-driven ICM agents can evolve their own active learning memory curricula by prioritizing storage of surprising, prediction-error-triggered experiences over rote task data, creating a self-improving memory architecture that outperforms static SOTA 2024 active memory designs. This creates a 'growing memory' dynamic where the agent’s intrinsic curiosity continuously reshapes what it retains, rather than relying on human-specified memory retention rules.
